name: specode
description: Lightweight spec-driven workflow: orchestrates superpowers skills per phase, lands 3 fixed docs (requirements/design/implementation-log). **v4.0.0 BREAKING**: 彻底拔出记忆注入工程 — 砍掉 specode 主流程的 (1) P3-1 codemap recall 注入 `## 已知约束 / 历史坑` 段, (2) P3-2 rule-acknowledgement post-check, (3) acceptance 后自动 AskUser 触发 distill。round 1/2 baseline 实验证明 recall 注入未 net 节省 token。保留 project-level CLAUDE.md / AGENT.md filesystem scan (不涉及 .ai-memory)。specode-distill skill v4 完全重写: 仅手动触发 `/specode:specode-distill <slug>`, 默认 md-only, 默认写 `/Volumes/External HD/Obsidian/Notes/11-KnowledgeBase/<slug>/` (--target-dir 可覆盖), 不再调 codemap recall, 不再默认写 .ai-memory yml。如需 v3 记忆注入行为, checkout `backup/specode-v3.4.0-task-swarm-v0.9.2`。
